title: Hard As Nails - High Power Adhesive | Bond Wood, Plastic, Brick, Glass, Ceramics, Metal & More | Solvent Free, No Need for Nails (180ml Tube)
features: NO NEED FOR NAILS!: 151 Hard As Nails Adhesive, super strength, ready to use high power adhesive. Bonds surfaces to each other. Can be used on china, wood, metal, card, leather, rubber and glass.

STRONG SOLVENT FREE: 151 Hard As Nails Adhesive, instant grab high strength adhesive is free from solvents. Ready to use, prior to application, surfaces must be dry, clean and free from dust and debris, re-seal after each use.
REPAIRS & DIY: 151 Hard As Nails Adhesive eliminates the need for screws and nails in many DIY and repair jobs. Suitable for interior bonding on vertical and horizontal surfaces
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, re-sealable 180ml Tube. Store at room temperature
